content.en:
"Break the tie!"

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord wanted to prevent Ye Tian's Seventh Dimensional Will from affecting his own body by disconnecting the connection.

But he still underestimated the terrifying nature of the seventh dimension mastery, which was a terrifying killing move that far surpassed the sixth dimension's will mastery!

"Kill!"

The light of the black mother's robbery and killing instantly annihilated the soul will of the clone of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, and Ye Tian also sensed the Blazing Sun Realm Lord~ other soul wills through the seventh dimension.

"The soul will of that place should be the body of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, then-kill them together!"

"Wumu robbery and killing technique, kill!"

In an instant, the light of the Black Mother's Killing Technique passed through the seventh dimension and slashed towards the Blazing Sun Realm Lord Body in a distant land.

With his seventh-dimensional will mastery and the soul will close to the eighth dimension, even if he is separated by such a long distance, at most a small part of his attack power will be weakened, and for other soul wills that are still in the fourth realm of the seventh dimension, it is still a second kill.

Unless the Blazing Sun Realm Lord's soul will reaches the eighth dimension, he can save his life.

At that time, as long as he blocked this blow, Ye Tian would not be able to perceive the position of his soul will.

However, he couldn't stop it.

......

A mysterious body.

An incomparably huge golden sun is revealing despair, this golden sun is the body of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, he is the Wushen Star Clan, and it is also a very powerful race, but the number is extremely rare.

It's just that no matter how huge his body is, no matter how deep he hides it, now he can't withstand Ye Tian's Wumu robbery and killing technique.

Rumble!!!

The Black Mother Robbery Killing Technique came from the seventh dimension and slammed into the soul will of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, directly obliterating his soul will.

The difference in strength between the two sides is too big, so it can't be stopped, if his strength is stronger, even if his soul will is weak, he can still withstand Ye Tian's will.

It's a pity that his strength is much lower than Ye Tian.

"The other party is dead!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Otherwise, such a fourth realm is still alive, and if it causes some trouble to the human race, it will be a disaster for the human race.

"Strange, why did these two Fourth Realms of the Blazing Sun Palace attack and kill me?"

He wondered.

is also the fourth realm, so they shouldn't attack each other.

It's like the dragon and wolf realm master who was killed by him, who was a super-dimensional realm cultivated in the early stage of the fourth realm, and he still has a multi-dimensional treasure bottle in his hand, and he hasn't been attacked and killed!

And the fact that he snatched the Duowei Treasure Gourd was definitely not exposed, otherwise it would not have been the two Blazing Sun Realm Lords.

But soon, he knew why.

Ye Tian found a treasure from the corpse of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, it was a fragment of a mutilated innate multi-dimensional treasure, and it was only with this fragment that he really knew the reason.

"This fragment can actually sense the treasure on my body!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Obviously, this fragment is not simple, if it is complete, it is an amazing innate multi-dimensional treasure, I am afraid that the fifth realm will be crazy.

Now it's just a fragment that can only be used to spy on treasures.

For Ye Tian, its value is still extremely precious, at least if you encounter something good, you won't miss it.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out the black statue, wanting to see what level of treasure this black statue was.

However, he was soon shocked.

"Hey, I can't detect it!"

He was confused.

Impossible, he couldn't crush this black statue, its material alone was a treasure, it couldn't be a treasure.

Then there is only one possibility, that is, the grade of this treasure is too high, and this innate multi-dimensional treasure fragment cannot be spied to the level.

In other words, it is a treasure that exceeds the purple point of light, and it is also the only treasure on Ye Tian's body that exceeds the purple point of light, and its value is definitely above the treasures such as the quasi-innate multidimensional treasure, the Nine Wutu, and the dimensional gravel.

"In the future, I have to take it out for research, in case I research something, maybe I can rise quickly!"

Ye Tian put away the black statue again and continued to explore the treasures on the Blazing Sun Realm Lord and Taijiang Realm Lord.

As a result, he only found some ordinary resources, and the treasures of a little value were gone.

"I'll go, this is still the fourth realm, it's too poor, right?"

Ye Tian was speechless.

He suspected that their treasures were all in the Blazing Sun Palace, so he took a little time to rush to the Blazing Sun Palace, forcibly broke the formation of the Blazing Sun Palace, and ransacked the treasure house of the Blazing Sun Palace.

As a result, the treasure house of the Blazing Sun Palace was also almost empty, and only one multi-dimensional treasure bottle had some value.

This multi-dimensional treasure bottle is a multi-dimensional rule treasure bottle, which is much stronger than Ye Tian's multi-dimensional rule treasure bottle imitation, with the help of which it can condense the essence of the multi-dimensional rules of the four realms, and can accelerate the improvement of one's super-dimensional rules.

"This multi-dimensional rule treasure bottle has helped me a lot, and it can be regarded as a harvest!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used the corpses of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord and the Taijiang Realm Lord to cultivate the essence of the Four Realms Multidimensional Rules.

......

Territory of 5,000.

Soon, the news of the fall of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord and the Taijiang Realm Lord spread.

Many of the Fourth Realms were shocked, because the strength of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord and the Taijiang Realm Lord was not weak, but it was not comparable to the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord, and now these two Fourth Realms had actually fallen.

Jiucai Chamber of Commerce.

The Six Shadows Realm Lord and the Multi-Ancient Realm Lord both found it incredible, and at the same time began to investigate, but they couldn't find anything.

Especially the Six Shadows Realm Lord, he frowned tightly.

"Duogu Realm Lord, it's not easy to kill the guy who is the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, it's definitely a big threat!"

The Lord of the Six Shadows Realm said.

"No, with the strength of the Six Shadows Realm Lord, you can also kill them, maybe the murderer's strength is not as good as you!"

"No, I can't kill the Blazing Sun Realm Lord!" the Six Shadows Realm Lord shook his head and said.

"How is this possible?"

The Lord of the Ancient Realm didn't believe it.

He knew that the strength of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord was not very strong!

The Six Shadows Realm Lord said solemnly: "The Blazing Sun Realm Lord you have seen is his clone, his body is hidden, and I don't know where his body is. But from the information we have now, the Blazing Sun Realm Lord has really fallen, and its body should have been killed, otherwise the Blazing Sun Realm Lord will definitely temporarily condense a simple clone to inform us of the murderer's situation. But now, there is no news, proving that the main body of the Blazing Sun Realm has also been killed. "

"This ......"

The Lord of the Duogu Realm was shocked.

A hidden Fourth Realm body was killed, what kind of means is this?

The Lord of the Six Shadows Realm said: "Either the other party knows the position of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord's body, or the other party will be the seventh dimension of the will, I hope it is the former, if it is the latter, it will be terrible!"
